Overview

This is a sample HTML document designed to test the HTML file processor. It contains various HTML elements including headings, paragraphs, lists, tables, links, and semantic markup.

The document structure demonstrates proper use of HTML5 semantic elements like <header>, <main>, <section>, <article>, and <footer>.

Key Features

Multi-Format Support

NeuroLink supports processing of 17+ file types including Excel, Word, PDF, JSON, YAML, XML, HTML, SVG, and source code files.

  • Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xls)
  • Word documents (.docx)
  • PDF documents
  • JSON and YAML data files
  • HTML and SVG markup
  • 50+ programming languages

Security Features

All file processing includes built-in security measures:

  1. XSS prevention and sanitization
  2. XXE attack detection for XML files
  3. Zip bomb detection
  4. Sensitive data redaction for config files

Pricing Table

Plan Price Features Support
Starter $0/month Basic file processing Community
Professional $49/month All formats + batch processing Email
Enterprise Custom Unlimited + custom processors 24/7 dedicated
